methodology: Bifocal+ (edge-walk + fractal, HAZOP, FMEA, adversarial challenge)

phase_0_risk_triage.justification: Auth boundaries, multi-user state, persistent storage, embedding pipeline, external integrations (Sleight dimension push)

store_to_index.evidence: remember_deferred() persists to RocksDB, embed_and_index() runs background Vamana insert + BM25 indexing

index_to_retrieve.evidence: recall() does hybrid retrieval (vector + BM25 + graph). Graph loaded but underutilized in standard mode.

retrieve_to_learn.evidence: reinforce_recall() boosts/decays importance, records access, strengthens Hebbian graph edges, PERSISTS to storage. Initially misidentified as void.

learn_to_store.evidence: reinforce_recall() calls self.long_term_memory.update() — writes back. Feedback IS transactional.

auth_to_query.evidence: X-API-Key header validation, per-user state isolation via MultiUserMemoryManager

query_to_result.evidence: Full retrieval pipeline with 20+ scoring signals

result_to_feedback.evidence: reinforce_feedback endpoint exists and works. Hebbian coactivation recorded.

feedback_to_auth.evidence: No per-user readiness probes. Cache eviction could affect active users.

corrected_findings.GF1_feedback_storage: ALREADY IMPLEMENTED — reinforce_recall() in src/memory/recall.rs:3896 boosts importance AND persists via long_term_memory.update(). Bifocal fractal agent was analyzing FeedbackStore (separate mechanism) and missed the primary feedback path.
corrected_findings.GF3_update_reembedding: ALREADY IMPLEMENTED — update_memory() in src/memory/mod.rs:3741 calls retriever.reindex_memory() AND hybrid_search.index_memory(). Full reembedding on content update.
corrected_findings.GF7_graceful_shutdown: ALREADY IMPLEMENTED — src/server.rs:486-585 has full sequence: SIGTERM/Ctrl-C → drain (5s) → flush databases → save vector indices → global timeout.

true_voids.name: Deletion verification
true_voids.description: delete_memory() returns success without verifying vector index consistency. Orphaned Vamana entries possible.

true_voids.name: Graph-informed recall underutilized
true_voids.description: recall.rs loads _graph but doesn't use it for standard retrieval mode. spreading_activation_retrieve exists but isn't wired to the handler.

true_voids.name: Competitive embedder dead code
true_voids.description: competitive.rs implements multi-model ensemble but is never called from the retrieval path.

true_voids.name: Per-user readiness probes missing
true_voids.description: health_ready() checks system-level readiness but not per-user cache state.

true_voids.name: RocksDB unconditionally compiled
true_voids.description: 138 source files reference rocksdb without cfg(feature) gates. Cannot build with redb-only. Documented as v1.0 work.

golden_features_for_v09: Wire spreading_activation_retrieve into recall handler as mode=graph (V5 closure)

multi_instance_assessment.reason: RocksDB exclusive file lock, Vamana unsynchronized mmap, DashMap cache per-process only
multi_instance_assessment.recommendation: Single-instance for v0.9. Multi-instance requires distributed lock coordinator (v1.0)

build_system.non_blocking: cargo build works while server runs (different process, different file handles)
build_system.rocksdb_issue: Unconditionally compiled on non-Windows. Feature-gating deferred to v1.0 (138 source refs)

meso.notes: Minor error mapping variance, async execution variance, return type variance in health endpoints

micro.notes: Graph loaded but unused in recall (_graph binding), competitive embedder dead code

v09_verdict: SHIP — with 3 golden features as v0.9.1 follow-ups. Toroid at 88% is sufficient for launch. Multi-instance deferred to v1.0.
